content.shortDescription: A marathon run promoting health, fitness, and social awareness under the theme “Run for a Reason.”
content.description:
The Department of International Business, Pondicherry University, presents the GLOBIZZ’26 Marathon Run to promote health, fitness, and social awareness.
With the theme “Run for a Reason,” the marathon encourages participants to support causes related to good health, well-being, and gender equality. The event invites individuals to stay active, spread awareness, and contribute to a meaningful community initiative.

rules.rule: Participants must report to the venue before the start time
Follow the designated marathon route and instructions from organizers
Participants should ensure they are medically fit to run
Maintain discipline and sportsmanship during the event
